urgent_methodology: Publisher-marked Breaking, Urgent, Alert, Just in, Developing or similar items are collected first and receive priority over standard items, unless they are liveblogs, programme previews or low-value content.

latest.title: Russia launches major ballistic missile attack on Ukrainian cities
latest.summary: Russia has conducted a series of missile and drone strikes on Ukraine, resulting in at least eight fatalities and numerous injuries. The strikes affected several cities, including Kharkiv, Kyiv, Zaporizhzhia, and Sumy.
latest.details: Russia has conducted a series of missile and drone strikes on Ukraine, resulting in at least eight fatalities and numerous injuries. The strikes affected several cities, including Kharkiv, Kyiv, Zaporizhzhia, and Sumy. Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky described the attack on Kyiv as one of the most significant since the invasion began in 2022. Ukraine's military reported that air defenses successfully intercepted a significant number of missiles and drones during the assault.
latest.full_brief: Russia has conducted a series of missile and drone strikes on Ukraine, resulting in at least eight fatalities and numerous injuries. The strikes affected several cities, including Kharkiv, Kyiv, Zaporizhzhia, and Sumy. Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky described the attack on Kyiv as one of the most significant since the invasion began in 2022. Ukraine's military reported that air defenses successfully intercepted a significant number of missiles and drones during the assault.

latest.title: Australian and NZ safety assurances about asbestos in play sand were based on supplier’s own…
latest.summary: Concerns have arisen regarding asbestos contamination in play sand products, leading to recalls across Australia and New Zealand. The Australian Competition and Consumer Commission (ACCC) based its initial safety assurances on an unverified assessment from the supplier.
latest.details: Concerns have arisen regarding asbestos contamination in play sand products, leading to recalls across Australia and New Zealand. The Australian Competition and Consumer Commission (ACCC) based its initial safety assurances on an unverified assessment from the supplier. Recent testing revealed that a significant percentage of the sand released asbestos when disturbed. The New Zealand workplace regulator has consistently challenged the safety claims made by Australian authorities.
latest.full_brief: Concerns have arisen regarding asbestos contamination in play sand products, leading to recalls across Australia and New Zealand. The Australian Competition and Consumer Commission (ACCC) based its initial safety assurances on an unverified assessment from the supplier. Recent testing revealed that a significant percentage of the sand released asbestos when disturbed. The New Zealand workplace regulator has consistently challenged the safety claims made by Australian authorities.

latest.title: Runners complete 'world's coolest marathon' on drifting North Pole ice
latest.summary: A unique marathon event took place at the geographic North Pole, attracting 23 runners from seven different countries. Participants ran on drifting sea ice, completing laps of a 1,055-meter loop while wearing thermal gear and life vests.
latest.details: A unique marathon event took place at the geographic North Pole, attracting 23 runners from seven different countries. Participants ran on drifting sea ice, completing laps of a 1,055-meter loop while wearing thermal gear and life vests. Denmark's Rikke Dam and China's Wang Shengxian emerged as the winners in the women's and men's categories, respectively. Organizers noted that the course disappeared shortly after the event concluded due to the shifting ice.
latest.full_brief: A unique marathon event took place at the geographic North Pole, attracting 23 runners from seven different countries. Participants ran on drifting sea ice, completing laps of a 1,055-meter loop while wearing thermal gear and life vests. Denmark's Rikke Dam and China's Wang Shengxian emerged as the winners in the women's and men's categories, respectively. Organizers noted that the course disappeared shortly after the event concluded due to the shifting ice.

latest.title: Government use of automated AI decision-making to be curbed under new Australian rules
latest.summary: The Australian government is working on new rules to regulate the use of automated AI decision-making in federal departments. This initiative aims to ensure that safety, fairness, accuracy, and transparency are prioritized in AI processes.
latest.details: The Australian government is working on new rules to regulate the use of automated AI decision-making in federal departments. This initiative aims to ensure that safety, fairness, accuracy, and transparency are prioritized in AI processes. The attorney general, Michelle Rowland, is leading the development of these new regulations. Additionally, the government plans to create a digital duty of care to hold AI companies accountable for safety features.
latest.full_brief: The Australian government is working on new rules to regulate the use of automated AI decision-making in federal departments. This initiative aims to ensure that safety, fairness, accuracy, and transparency are prioritized in AI processes. The attorney general, Michelle Rowland, is leading the development of these new regulations. Additionally, the government plans to create a digital duty of care to hold AI companies accountable for safety features.

latest.title: The future of physical games is not looking great
latest.summary: Players and game preservationists might need to prepare for a world without discs. Digital libraries are increasingly convenient, especially as console makers have made efforts to keep backwards compatibility across generations.
latest.details: Players and game preservationists might need to prepare for a world without discs. Digital libraries are increasingly convenient, especially as console makers have made efforts to keep backwards compatibility across generations. Capcom reported that an astounding 93 percent of its game sales were for digital copies in its last fiscal year. Many of the most popular games are only available digitally, like Roblox and Fortnite.
latest.full_brief: Players and game preservationists might need to prepare for a world without discs. Digital libraries are increasingly convenient, especially as console makers have made efforts to keep backwards compatibility across generations. Capcom reported that an astounding 93 percent of its game sales were for digital copies in its last fiscal year. Many of the most popular games are only available digitally, like Roblox and Fortnite.

latest.title: Messi on the brink of history - will it be his last World Cup game?
latest.summary: Lionel Messi's performance is crucial for Argentina as they aim to win consecutive World Cups. If successful, he would become the first captain to lift the trophy twice.
latest.details: Lionel Messi's performance is crucial for Argentina as they aim to win consecutive World Cups. If successful, he would become the first captain to lift the trophy twice. Messi is currently just one goal behind Kylian Mbappe in the race to become the World Cup's all-time leading scorer. There is speculation about whether this will be Messi's last World Cup appearance, with discussions about his potential participation in the 2030 tournament.
latest.full_brief: Lionel Messi's performance is crucial for Argentina as they aim to win consecutive World Cups. If successful, he would become the first captain to lift the trophy twice. Messi is currently just one goal behind Kylian Mbappe in the race to become the World Cup's all-time leading scorer. There is speculation about whether this will be Messi's last World Cup appearance, with discussions about his potential participation in the 2030 tournament.

latest.title: Cuban dissident Luis Manuel Otero Alcántara goes into exile in US
latest.summary: Luis Manuel Otero Alcántara, a prominent Cuban dissident, has gone into exile in the US after serving a five-year prison sentence. He is the leader of the San Isidro Movement, which advocates for freedom of speech and democracy in Cuba.
latest.details: Luis Manuel Otero Alcántara, a prominent Cuban dissident, has gone into exile in the US after serving a five-year prison sentence. He is the leader of the San Isidro Movement, which advocates for freedom of speech and democracy in Cuba. Otero Alcántara was arrested during significant anti-government protests in 2021. His case has contributed to ongoing diplomatic tensions between the US and Cuba.
latest.full_brief: Luis Manuel Otero Alcántara, a prominent Cuban dissident, has gone into exile in the US after serving a five-year prison sentence. He is the leader of the San Isidro Movement, which advocates for freedom of speech and democracy in Cuba. Otero Alcántara was arrested during significant anti-government protests in 2021. His case has contributed to ongoing diplomatic tensions between the US and Cuba.

latest.title: Earthquake in Peru leaves at least five dead
latest.summary: A 5.5-magnitude earthquake struck the Andes region of Peru, resulting in at least five fatalities. The earthquake occurred on Saturday at 9.24pm, with its epicentre located 2km west-south-west of Sicaya in Huancayo province.
latest.details: A 5.5-magnitude earthquake struck the Andes region of Peru, resulting in at least five fatalities. The earthquake occurred on Saturday at 9.24pm, with its epicentre located 2km west-south-west of Sicaya in Huancayo province. Over 20 individuals sustained injuries, and approximately 300 people have been displaced due to the collapse of several buildings. The local civil defence office indicated that the use of rustic adobe materials in construction contributed to the extent of the damage.
latest.full_brief: A 5.5-magnitude earthquake struck the Andes region of Peru, resulting in at least five fatalities. The earthquake occurred on Saturday at 9.24pm, with its epicentre located 2km west-south-west of Sicaya in Huancayo province. Over 20 individuals sustained injuries, and approximately 300 people have been displaced due to the collapse of several buildings. The local civil defence office indicated that the use of rustic adobe materials in construction contributed to the extent of the damage.

brief_methodology.pl: Komentarz powstaje wyłącznie z przeczytanego tekstu artykułu. Musi przejść niezależny przegląd AI oraz pełną kontrolę językową; surowy tekst artykułu lub RSS nie może być komentarzem awaryjnym.
brief_methodology.en: A comment is created only from the retrieved article text. It must pass an independent AI review and the complete language gate; raw article or RSS text is never a fallback comment.

comment_quality_gate.pl: Publikowany jest wyłącznie komentarz utworzony z tekstu artykułu, zatwierdzony w niezależnym przeglądzie AI i przyjęty w całości przez rygorystyczną kontrolę językową. Jedno wadliwe zdanie odrzuca cały komentarz.
comment_quality_gate.en: Only an article-derived comment approved by an independent AI review and accepted in full by the strict language gate is published. One defective sentence rejects the whole comment.

same_story_dedupe.rule: One underlying event gets one homepage card, even if multiple publishers cover it with different links.
